_doc: Starter 1999 (S99) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/s99.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 55C / 55U / 35R / 0M. Collation: striped, 10x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: Small set with fewer rares than a normal small set of the era. Printed in Belgium. 8 additional commons only appear in preconstructed products. No foils mentioned. 36 packs per box.

draft.tagline: 9 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare · 1 basic land · no foil
